value.found_quote: Workflows enable you to define a series of steps to guide the Agent through a repetitive set of tasks, such as deploying a service or responding to PR comments. These Workflows are saved as markdown files, allowing you to have an easy repeatable way to run key processes.
value.rationale: The page (Google Antigravity docs) describes Workflows as saved markdown files defining a repeatable series of steps to guide the Agent through tasks, matching the claim. The ability to invoke them across global and workspace scopes and across sessions is also described. Presented as a current feature.
